review_questions: Does the implementation stay inside P4-IMPL-04 and the P4-SPEC-03 package/example/migration intent?
Does package manifest validation reject forbidden paths, untracked release inputs, dirty-state/hash issues, and semantic payloads?
Does example smoke validation stay in the fixture path and compare expected hashes without creating product semantics?
Does migration coverage validate every row, blocked Human Gate status, summary consistency, and report hash?
Do targeted tests, P4 tests, full regression, runtime-boundary-check, py_compile, and git diff check pass?
